sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51852" key="kaqistia/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καθιστ-ιάω</orth>, <sense id="n51852.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">spend on feasts,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τόκον</foreign> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12(7).237.25</biblScope></bibl>, cf. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">56</biblScope> </bibl> (<placeName TEIform="placeName">Amorgos</placeName>).</sense> </entryFree>
